{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Naraka Traveling room
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Naraka Traveling room]] is where each [[Naraka Traveler]] in the [[Grandmasters’ palace]] arrives and departs.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c24">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
